title: About me

content: “Designed and implemented game logic, random asteroid movement, rocket control, and collision detection.” “Developed interactive features such as keyboard control, movement, and level-up mechanisms.” “Implemented complex state management with multiple levels, scores, and life points using global variables and event listeners.”
summary: “Designed and implemented game logic, random asteroid movement, rocket control, and collision detection.” “Developed interactive features such as keyboard control, movement, and level-up mechanisms.” “Implemented complex state management with multiple levels, scores, and life points using global variables and event listeners.”
title: Asteroids Game Development Project

content: “Built using Python, inspired by Google’s original MapReduce paper for efficient execution of MapReduce programs across computer clusters.” “Designed Manager and Workers components for task distribution and execution via TCP/UDP sockets.” “Utilized OS concurrency (threads, processes) for task and resource optimization.”
summary: “Built using Python, inspired by Google’s original MapReduce paper for efficient execution of MapReduce programs across computer clusters.” “Designed Manager and Workers components for task distribution and execution via TCP/UDP sockets.” “Utilized OS concurrency (threads, processes) for task and resource optimization.”
title: Hadoop MapReduce Simulation

content: “Utilized React.js to create an interactive web application with client-side dynamic pages.” “Used Flask for backend development, ensuring a robust and responsive server environment.” “Employed AJAX for asynchronous data processing and dynamic user interface enhancements.” “Integrated NGINX as a high-performance web server and reverse proxy, boosting application scalability.”
summary: “Utilized React.js to create an interactive web application with client-side dynamic pages.” “Used Flask for backend development, ensuring a robust and responsive server environment.” “Employed AJAX for asynchronous data processing and dynamic user interface enhancements.” “Integrated NGINX as a high-performance web server and reverse proxy, boosting application scalability.”
title: InstaCraft: Instagram Clone

content: “Employed Service-Oriented Architecture for scaling dynamic web pages and searches.” “Optimized search queries by refining input and employing a mix of tf-idf and PageRank scores for accurate results.” “Developed a scalable search engine, focusing on text analysis and link analysis (PageRank), using MapReduce parallel data processing.”

title: Scalable Search Engine Development
